engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: page_view
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a page loads or the browser history state changes.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: scroll
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered the first time a user reaches the bottom (90% depth) of each page.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: click
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user clicks a link that leads away from the current domain.

parameters.description: CSS classes on the clicked link.
HTML id attribute of the link.
Full URL of the link destination.
True if the link leads off-domain.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: view_search_results
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user views search results on your site.

parameters.description: The term the user searched for.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: file_download
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user clicks a link to a common document or compressed file.

parameters.description: Extension of the downloaded file (e.g. pdf).

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: video_start
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when an embedded YouTube video starts playing.

parameters.description: True if the video player is visible in the viewport.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: video_progress
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user watches 10%, 25%, 50%, or 75% of a video.

parameters.description: True if the video player is visible in the viewport.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: video_complete
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user finishes watching a video.

parameters.description: True if the video player is visible in the viewport.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: form_start
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered the first time a user interacts with a form in a session.

parameters.description: HTML id of the form element.
HTML name attribute of the form.

engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.name: form_submit
engagement_and_enhanced_measurement.description: Triggered when a user submits a form.

parameters.description: HTML id of the form element.
HTML name attribute of the form.

account_and_system.name: login
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user logs in.

account_and_system.name: sign_up
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user registers for an account.

account_and_system.name: share
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user shares content.

parameters.description: ID of the shared content item.

account_and_system.name: search
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user searches your site or app.

parameters.description: The term the user searched for.

account_and_system.name: select_content
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user selects content (e.g. a tab, accordion item, or card).

account_and_system.name: join_group
account_and_system.description: Triggered when a user joins a group (e.g. team, guild, or community).

ecommerce.name: view_item_list
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user views a list of products or offerings.

parameters.description: Array of item objects. See item parameters reference.

ecommerce.name: select_item
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user selects an item from a list.

parameters.description: Identifier for the list the item was selected from.
Array containing the selected item object.

ecommerce.name: view_item
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user views a product detail page.

parameters.description: Monetary value of the item viewed.
Array containing the viewed item object.

ecommerce.name: add_to_cart
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user adds an item to their shopping cart.

parameters.description: Array of item objects added to cart.

ecommerce.name: remove_from_cart
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user removes an item from their shopping cart.

parameters.description: Array of item objects removed from cart.

ecommerce.name: add_to_wishlist
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user adds an item to a wishlist.

parameters.description: Monetary value of items added to wishlist.
Array of item objects added to wishlist.

ecommerce.name: view_promotion
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a promotion is shown to a user.

parameters.description: Slot where the creative was shown.

ecommerce.name: select_promotion
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user clicks on a promotion.

parameters.description: Slot where the creative was shown.

ecommerce.name: begin_checkout
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user begins the checkout process.

parameters.description: Total monetary value of items in checkout.
Array of item objects in the cart.

ecommerce.name: add_shipping_info
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user submits their shipping information during checkout.

parameters.description: Total monetary value of the order.
Array of item objects in the order.

ecommerce.name: add_payment_info
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user submits their payment information during checkout.

parameters.description: Total monetary value of the order.
Selected payment method (e.g. Credit Card, PayPal).
Array of item objects in the order.

ecommerce.name: purchase
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a user completes a purchase.

parameters.description: Total revenue (not including tax and shipping).
Coupon code applied to the purchase.

ecommerce.name: refund
ecommerce.description: Triggered when a refund is issued.

parameters.description: Array of refunded item objects (partial refund).

lead_gen.name: generate_lead
lead_gen.description: Triggered when a lead form is submitted.

lead_gen.name: qualify_lead
lead_gen.description: Triggered when a lead is qualified (typically an offline or CRM event).

parameters.description: Value assigned to the qualified lead.

gaming.name: tutorial_begin
gaming.description: Triggered when a user begins a tutorial.

gaming.name: tutorial_complete
gaming.description: Triggered when a user completes a tutorial.

gaming.name: level_start
gaming.description: Triggered when a user starts a level.

parameters.description: Name or identifier for the level.

gaming.name: level_end
gaming.description: Triggered when a user finishes a level.

parameters.description: Name or identifier for the level.
True if the user completed the level successfully.

gaming.name: level_up
gaming.description: Triggered when a user levels up.

parameters.description: Character or avatar associated with the level up.

gaming.name: post_score
gaming.description: Triggered when a user posts a score.

parameters.description: Level the score was achieved at.

gaming.name: unlock_achievement
gaming.description: Triggered when a user earns an achievement.

gaming.name: earn_virtual_currency
gaming.description: Triggered when a user earns virtual currency.

parameters.description: Name of the virtual currency (e.g. Gems, Coins).

gaming.name: spend_virtual_currency
gaming.description: Triggered when a user spends virtual currency.

parameters.description: Name of the item purchased with virtual currency.

item_parameters_reference.name: _item_parameters
item_parameters_reference.description: Standard parameters for objects inside the ecommerce.items[] array. Use these as a reference when documenting item-scoped parameters in ecommerce events.

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the item (e.g. SKU).
Store or affiliate associated with the item.
Coupon code applied to the item.
Monetary discount applied to the item.
Position of the item in a list.
List the item was presented in.
Variant of the item (e.g. color, size).
Physical location associated with the item.
